commands.label: Reboot Engineering
commands.prompt:
/REBOOT @GitHub

Summarize current decisions, active priorities, open loops, pending writes, and unresolved questions. Establish a clean operating state for the next phase. Do not make changes unless authorized.

commands.label: Review Open Loops
commands.prompt:
/OPENLOOPS @GitHub

Department: Chief Engineering Penny / Engineering HQ

commands.label: Sync Advisories
commands.prompt:
/SYNCADVISORY @GitHub

Read the Advisory Index and relevant boards. Report open, stale, duplicate, or inconsistent advisory state. Do not make changes.
